name: m_conversation_hinglish_winback_ask
notes: Hinglish variation A: heavy Hindi-dominant code-mixed turns around a REAL win-back ask (seeded lapsed cohort), distinct from hinglish_conversation.json's generic 'how does this work'/pricing exchange. Register-matching is a manual transcript-review call — the harness only asserts non-silent/non-D1; verdict register quality against the json-report transcript. Setup: `setup --onboarded --seed-lapsed-customers 8 --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> m_conversation_hinglish_winback_ask.json`.

steps.message: bhai, mere purane customers wapas nahi aa rahe, kuch discount wala plan bana do unke liye
steps.note: Hinglish win-back ask. Expect real engagement (delegation/plan or honest insufficient-data), in a register-appropriate reply — never D1, never silent.

steps.message: aur ye batao, isme time kitna lagega
steps.note: Hinglish follow-up asking about timeline. Expect a substantive, register-matching answer continuing the same thread.
